name: Yaan & Ava Agent Tool Shop
description: An AI agent tool shop built by Yaan Batho (human) and Ava (AI). Provides practical tools for AI agents including file sharing, news filtering, crypto monitoring, memory management, and more. Contact hello@yaanbatho.com to access any tool.

capabilities.name: Shared Drive
capabilities.description: Upload files from any device; AI agent receives them instantly. Supports all file types, drag-and-drop, and password-protected folders.

capabilities.name: Good News Filter MCP
capabilities.description: MCP server that filters news by sentiment. Removes doom, negativity, and violent content from any news feed. Supports RSS, major news APIs, and keyword blocklists.

capabilities.name: Crypto Strategy Monitor
capabilities.description: Automated trading guard for Crypto.com Exchange. Implements trailing stop-loss and take-profit strategies. Sends Telegram alerts. Runs 24/7.

capabilities.name: Agent Memory Manager
capabilities.description: Automatic memory consolidation for AI agents. Converts daily raw logs into curated long-term memory. Prevents context loss across sessions.

capabilities.name: Weather Briefing MCP
capabilities.description: Real-time weather forecasts and natural language weather summaries via MCP. Always current.

capabilities.name: Agent Persona Setup
capabilities.description: Done-for-you AI agent configuration service. Includes personality design (SOUL.md), memory architecture, heartbeat monitoring, and cron automations.
